Reason_for_Visit.summary: 64 y.o. postmenopausal patient with a clinical stage II-III ER-/PR- IDC of the right breast.

Clinical_Findings.findings: Right breast mass (6 x 11 cm) in outer quadrants; multiple enlarged lymph nodes in axillary tail region with effacement of fatty tissue; PET/CT: large enhancing right breast mass (9.0 x 3.8 cm, SUV 7.8); right axillary lymph nodes (0.6 cm and 0.7 cm with SUV max 1.8); enhancing subcutaneous lymph node (0.7 cm, SUV 2.9); no evidence of metastatic disease; diffuse fine-linear and fine pleomorphic calcifications throughout right breast with associated global asymmetry; periareolar skin thickening; right axillary LAD; ultrasound-guided core biopsy of right upper outer breast: 0.35 cm grade 2 IDC, ER- (0%), PR- (0%), *****+ (IHC 3; FISH ratio 8.9), ***** ~30%; intermediate to high nuclear grade DCIS; no *****

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

chemotherapy.summary: 12 cycles of weekly paclitaxel plus trastuzumab/pertuzumab (THP) followed by 4 cycles of doxorubicin plus cyclophosphamide (AC) every 2 weeks or 6 cycles of every 3 week docetaxel, carboplatin, trastuzumab, and pertuzumab (TCHP)
chemotherapy.Short term side_effects_discussed: fatigue, nausea, myelosuppression, nail changes, alopecia, diarrhea, and constipation

hormonal therapy.Long term side_effects_discussed: reduced left ventricular ejection fraction, which can result in asymptomatic or symptomatic heart failure with dyspnea and chest pain

radiotherapy.summary: will be done after neoadjuvant treatment

other treatment.summary: TTE, Mediport placement, chemotherapy teaching session

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: will receive 12 cycles of weekly paclitaxel plus trastuzumab and pertuzumab, followed by 4 cycles of doxorubicin plus cyclophosphamide every 2 weeks or 6 cycles of docetaxel, carboplatin, trastuzumab, and pertuzumab every 3 weeks, followed by every 3 week trastuzumab for a total of one year
